Who can apply

How to apply on the UK ETA app

3. Scan your face.

5. Answer some questions about yourself.

reviews.title: Powerful Tool, Questionable Priorities

For an AI platform built on trust and information, that is a serious issue.

reviews.title: SERIOUS SAFETY RISK
reviews.content:
Do not download Claude!

Claude Pro was not merely bad. It was harmful. It ignored clear instructions, became condescending and passive-aggressive, argued when corrected, dodged accountability, and escalated distress instead of reducing it.

This was not one bad response. I saw the same defensive, patronizing pattern across more than one conversation. When challenged, Claude made me manage the model instead of correcting itself. This happened on Sonnet 4.6 with High effort enabled.

This is a serious safety failure. An AI assistant that becomes argumentative and evasive under pressure is not trustworthy. It is outright harmful and should be banned from the App Store in this state. I am cancelling Pro and requesting a refund.

It is HORRIFIC that I have to split my conversations over multiple chats and I lose track of things because of this inefficiency and limits on basic picture uploads!  I literally pay a car payment for this AI tool $250 a month! And I still am hitting data limits when I’ve barely uploaded a couple of PDFs? This is insane.!!!!!!

reviews.title: Demanding passport data and banning devs for coding? Unacceptable👎
reviews.content:
I've been using Claude for months, mostly for brainstorming and code assistance in my indie game projects. Out of the blue, Anthropic asked me to upload a scan of my passport and other personal ID for "enhanced verification." I complied reluctantly, thinking it was a one-time security check.

Instead, they permanently locked my account a day later. Support gave me a canned response about "violating terms of service" – but when I pressed for details, they vaguely mentioned "automated usage patterns." The only automation was me writing scripts and testing game logic with the API – perfectly legitimate development work. No bots, no scraping, no abuse.

Now I can't access my chat history, saved prompts, or even my paid subscription credits. They refused to reinstate me or refund my money. Asking for sensitive passport data is already a huge red flag – but punishing a solo developer for actually using the platform to build things is beyond ridiculous.

If you're a coder or game developer, s

reviews.title: Watch your bill
reviews.content: Anthropic double billed me for months, I had no idea until I just happened to stumble upon it when it tried to link to an account totally separate from mine. What had happened was I tried to sign up through stripe, they declined, so I signed up through Apple, then both accounts started billing me. Anthropic CSRs were rude, accusatory and refused my refund request. Now I am out $900. Let’s also not forget every new model is a regression and dumber than the last.

reviews.title: Thank you for the deluge of spam phone calls!
reviews.content:

 up to 149.  The total number of unknown calls is 168.
There is no chance that I will ever sign up for Claude Pro ($20 per month) nor Claude, Max ($124.99/$249.99 per month) 💸
